notes: Core mechanics mostly work including formation movement, diving, capture beam, and dual-ship rescue, but visual fidelity is basic geometric shapes rather than authentic Galaga sprites, the capture sequence has logic issues (beam doesn't reliably pull player), and the HUD score rendering uses newline in fillText which doesn't render correctly.
An incredibly impressive and feature-complete Galaga clone that even includes the iconic capture beam and dual-ship mechanics.

A competent Galaga-like with stages, dives, shooting, capture/dual-ship ideas and no obvious fatal errors, but several mechanics are simplified or inaccurate to the original and some implementation details feel rough rather than polished.
